raw_text: tubilla industrial electronic engineer career summary danobat electronic engineer july 2015 - present key responsabilities e development of nc, plc and software programs for different manufacturing and automation technologies, specialized in grinding and turning. commissioning in-house and in customer premises. technical assistance service. supporting customer remotely and on-site, and managing requests. working with robots, automation and handling systems. project planning. e contact with different fields customers: aerospace, automotive, capital goods, energy... participation in the management of production processes, lean methodology. e preparation of technical documentation. education bachelor's degree in industrial electronics and automation engineering upv/ehu (euiti eibar) 2010 - 2014 academic awards e 2014 end-of-degree award organized by kutxa for having the best academic record. e final thesis project with honors, "cogeneration system based on pem fuel cell." software e cnc. siemens sinumerik y fanuc. plc siemens: step7 y tia portal. plc fanuc ladder. e abb robotstudio. c++ matlab electronic engineer with 7+ years of experience in the field of machine tool and automation. working on the design, development and commissioning of manufacturing equipment.
